outputs.name: kv_cache_k
outputs.desc: Packed FP16 K cache slice at current pos

outputs.name: kv_cache_v
outputs.desc: Packed FP16 V cache slice at current pos

impl.c_declaration: void kv_cache_store_f16(uint16_t *kv_cache_k, uint16_t *kv_cache_v, const float *k, const float *v, int layer, int pos, int num_kv_heads, int head_dim, int max_seq_len);

notes: Store K and V to a packed FP16 decode KV cache at the current position.
